title: Shinji and Toji as a Pilot
display_title: Shinji and Toji as a Pilot
wikitext:
[]: Shinji and Toji as a Pilot             Quote Post by AcesHigh » Wed Jan 24, 2007 10:04 pm This has probably already been asked, but it has always confused me a bit. When Toji was selected as a pilot, why was that made into such a big deal? Misato was so relunctant to tell Shinji about it. Despite their past (Toji hitting Shinji), they are now friends and that is pretty irrelevant. So what is the big deal?

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Jan 24, 2007 10:19 pm well as you mustve noticed, Shinji has issues with depression...as in...he gets depressed easily... if his friend was chosen to be an Eva pilot...to be face to face with death all the time like him...it would make him depressed

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jan 24, 2007 10:31 pm Shinji is a whiny little putz that can't handle anything.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 24, 2007 11:03 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Shinji is a whiny little putz that can't handle anything.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Thu Jan 25, 2007 12:23 am True, Shinji is as wussy as they come, but it would seem his fears ended up being justified. He did end up killing/wounding his best friend after all (depending on whether you subscribe to the manga or anime version of events. )

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jan 25, 2007 6:23 am was a thread on ANF about this: http://www.animenation.net/forums/showthread.php?t=199861

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sat Jan 27, 2007 2:20 am id freak out too...but it wouldn't have been much better if they had told him...the same thing would've happened only Shinji would've known it was Toji...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jan 27, 2007 11:27 am Reichu wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Shinji is a whiny little putz that can't handle anything.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 27, 2007 9:18 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Reichu wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Shinji is a whiny little putz that can't handle anything.
